summary: Completed frontend testing for imported form behavior and UX simplification. All 7 features verified successfully: Imported forms (status=completed_imported) show document-first view with 'Uploaded Evidence' badge, banner explaining compliance evidence, View Document/Download/Verify buttons, and file info with filename and upload date. No 'Failed to load form' error for imported forms. Internal Forms (Admin) tab shows imported forms with inline View/Download buttons. Regular forms still show form editor correctly.
passed_tests: 'Uploaded Evidence' badge displayed on imported form
Banner text displayed: 'This document was uploaded as compliance evidence. The original file is available below.'
'View Document' button present on imported form
'Verify' button present on imported form (for unverified forms)
File info displayed with filename (Reference 1.pdf) and upload date (3/27/2026)
No 'Failed to load form' error for imported forms
Regular form (Interview Record) shows form editor correctly (data-testid='form-editor')
Internal Forms (Admin) tab found and clickable
Internal Forms tab shows helper text: 'Forms are internal workflows. Completed forms generate PDF evidence stored in the checklist.'
Imported forms in Internal Forms tab have inline View/Download buttons (not clickable cards)
Second imported form (Contract Acknowledgement) shows document-first view correctly
seed_data_creation: Used existing test data - Employee: Olakunle Alonge (OCS-0001), Imported forms: Reference 1 (c2efc29a-42bb-42c7-9c3f-ba02e2416de8), Contract Acknowledgement (1f018276-b997-48b5-82c8-2d1bbe4b0ee3), Regular form: Interview Record (24cd1e4c-bae0-470a-a577-233003f085c9)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Imported form behavior verified. Key implementation: FormEditorPage.js checks for status='completed_imported' or source='imported' or missing template to show document-first view. Document view includes: 'Uploaded Evidence' badge, info banner, View Document/Download/Verify buttons, file info card with filename and upload date. EmployeeProfilePage.js Internal Forms tab shows imported forms with inline View/Download buttons instead of clickable cards. Regular forms with templates still show the form editor.
